Description.English:
Valuable interstellar trading mineral, typically mined from asteroids. Occasionally found in underground planetary deposits.

Prized by people in all systems for its lustre and shine.
Description.SimplifiedChinese:
珍贵的星际交易矿物，通常采掘自小行星。有时可在地下行星沉积物中发现。

所有恒星系的居民都非常喜爱它散发出的熠熠光泽。
Description.TraditionalChinese:
珍貴的星際交易礦物，通常從小行星開採而來。有時能在星球地底資源產地找到。

光彩奪目，因此所有星系的居民都十分珍視。

PinObjectiveTip.English: Silver is a valuable interstellar trading mineral, most commonly mined from asteroids. Occasionally found in underground planetary deposits.
PinObjectiveTip.SimplifiedChinese: 银是一种非常珍贵的星际交易矿物，通常从小行星开采得到。有时可在行星地下矿床中发现。
PinObjectiveTip.TraditionalChinese: 銀是非常珍貴的星際交易礦物，通常從小行星開採而來。有時能在星球地底資源產地找到。

PinObjectiveMessage.English:
Mine silver from asteroids while piloting the starship (SHIPFIRE)
Silver is abundant in most asteroid fields
PinObjectiveMessage.SimplifiedChinese:
驾驶飞船（SHIPFIRE）开采小行星中的银
绝大多数小行星带中都富含银
PinObjectiveMessage.TraditionalChinese:
駕駛太空船 (SHIPFIRE)，從小行星開採銀礦
銀礦在大部分的小行星帶中都相當常見
